stories.headline: The world's most strategic straits and channels
stories.description: Al Jazeera maps out 10 of the most important waterways that are essential for transporting the world's goods.

stories.headline: Nigeria's president to begin first state visit in 37 years
stories.description: King Charles and senior royals will provide a ceremonial welcome for Nigeria's President Tinubu on his state visit.

stories.headline: Israel bombs central Beirut, killing 6, strafes south, east Lebanon
stories.description: Wave of Israeli air attacks launched as ground offensive widens in south where Hezbollah are fighting Israeli forces.

stories.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 19 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: Iran vows revenge after Israeli strikes kill security chief Ali Larijani and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani.

stories.headline: Iran launches ‘revenge’ missile attack on Israel after assassinations
stories.description: Attack kills two people in central Israel’s Ramat Gan area and damages a Tel Aviv train station.
